title: Invoked Agents run on lighter models (sonnet for gates/research, haiku for clerk)
description: Brooks's directive: one-off Invoked Agents don't need big models. Add model frontmatter: sonnet for the Adherence/gate agents (alignment, process-adherence in the Template; code-standards, package-qa at root) and nothing-new-under-the-sun; clerk stays haiku. Persistent Teammates keep inheriting the session model. Chartered definition change: alignment gate + Team Lead approval; Src-First with root mirrors.
acceptance_criteria: The five one-off defs carry model: sonnet (clerk stays haiku)
Persistent Teammate defs carry no model pin
alignment PASS; root mirrors src/template for stamped defs
fix: model: sonnet on alignment/process-adherence/nothing-new (template+root) and code-standards/package-qa (root); clerk stays haiku; Teammates unpinned. alignment PASS, Brooks approved.
